### Added
- Add KSM metrics for Gateway API `ListenerSet` and `ReferenceGrant` resources.
### Changed
- Update Gateway API KSM configs to `v1` for `Gateway`, `GatewayClass`, `HTTPRoute`, `GRPCRoute`, `TLSRoute` and `BackendTLSPolicy`.
